---
title: "Research"
page-layout: full
---

## Working Papers

**Incentive Design on Networks** (with A. Daripa and S. Kapur)
<br>Examines how incentive structures can be optimally designed to induce the formation of socially optimal networks.
<br>[[SSRN]](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=4312506)

---

**Network Structures and Credit Rating** (with A. Daripa and S. Kapur)
<br>We ask if consistent credit rating — where agents' ratings are increasing in their productivity — is possible using network characteristics alone.
<br>[[SSRN]](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=3446432)

---

## Published Papers

**Decentralized Defence and Security in Networked Systems**
<br>*Defence and Peace Economics*, 2019.

---

**Centrality in Trade Networks and Investment in Security** (with V. Bove and L. Elia)
<br>*Peace Economics, Peace Science and Public Policy*, 2016.
